Precondition: cup_1 and cup_2 are accessible; both end effectors are free.
Postcondition: Right end effector grasps cup_2 and left end effector grasps cup_1.

Precondition: Right end effector grasps cup_2 and left end effector grasps cup_1; table top is available for placement.
Postcondition: cup_2 and cup_1 are placed on the table; both end effectors are free; box top is unblocked.

Precondition: box left and right sides are accessible; both end effectors are free; box top is unblocked.
Postcondition: Box is grasped with both end effectors (dual-arm symmetric).
